declarations.comments:
Video player component

Renders a full-featured video player with custom controls overlay.
Supports keyboard shortcuts, captions, quality selection, and more.
declarations.title: videoPlayer

declarations.comments: Auto-advance to next track in playlist
declarations.title: autoAdvance

declarations.comments: Set thumbnail sprite source for preview
declarations.title: thumbnailSrc

declarations.comments: Format time in seconds to MM:SS or HH:MM:SS
declarations.title: formatTime

declarations.comments: Video player ref for imperative control
declarations.title: VideoPlayerRef

declarations.comments: Create video player ref for imperative control
declarations.title: createVideoRef

declarations.comments: Go to next track in playlist
declarations.title: nextTrack

declarations.comments: Go to previous track in playlist
declarations.title: previousTrack

declarations.comments: Go to specific track in playlist
declarations.title: goToTrack

name: Hydrogen.Media.VideoPlayer
